observations.archetype_gloss: Represents the divided, conflicted self and internal struggle
observations.summary: Dan experiences an internal division and conflict, symbolized by his enormous, hunched shadow and the house divided against itself, reflecting his struggle with his own shadow aspects and the cost of testing his power.

evidence.quote: His shadow against the wall was enormous and hunched—a shape barely recognizable as a boy. He had chosen the cold fire of the star over the warm rot of the sea. The house was divided against itself, and so was he. He had not come here tonight to save his father. He had come here to test whether the power still held, and it had held, and the cost of testing it was written in every tight muscle and leaden limb.

accepted_observations.summary: Dan experiences an internal division and conflict, symbolized by his enormous, hunched shadow and the house divided against itself, reflecting his struggle with his own shadow aspects and the cost of testing his power.
